author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Benchmark BDC CLI v2 against v1, empirical winners, and expert memos on a minimum five-case real workflow suite before any release decision is allowed.
research_question: Does BDC CLI v2 materially improve architecture agreement, role-count agreement, and strategy-mode agreement relative to v1 across real benchmark cases, including TextAI_Auto?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after TASK-7530 is SUCCESS.

tests_required: v2 beats v1 on agreement for the majority of cases
definition_of_done: agreement metrics computed for empirical winner, expert memo, v1, and v2
v2 outperforms v1 on the majority of cases
out_of_scope: changing benchmark winner labels without evidence
